title: LP01: Hero
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%" padding="s">
  <gds-card variant="neutral-02-outlined">
    <gds-list>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable padding-inline="m">
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-flex flex="1" flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="end" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable padding-inline="m" href="#">

          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>

        </gds-flex>

  </gds-card>
</gds-div>
